published.title_en: DSpark 2026: DeepSeek 60–85% Faster Inference
published.title_zh: DSpark 2026：DeepSeek 推理加速 60-85% 实测
published.hot_topic_source: ⭐ 2026-06-29 daily report (DeepSeek DSpark speculative decoding framework: 60-85% per-user generation speedup on V4 vs MTP-1, open-source DeepSpec training code, OpenAI-compatible API serving DSpark-5 by default)
published.notes: News analysis piece on DeepSeek's DSpark release (2026-06-27). Two mechanisms explained: semi-autoregressive drafting (parallel DFlash backbone + lightweight Markov sequential head, rank-256 low-rank factorization) and confidence-scheduled verification (Sequential Temperature Scaling + hardware-aware prefix scheduler using SPS(B) curve). Production numbers: 60-85% per-user speedup on V4-Flash, 57-78% on V4-Pro. Drafter comparison table (Eagle3 / DFlash / MTP-1 / DSpark). Three production deployment patterns. 7-question FAQ. EN 55-char title / 149-char desc, ZH 45-char title / 75-char desc. FreeModel affiliate in conclusion paragraph (DeepSeek has affiliateAvailable=false).

drafts.title_en: GPT-5.6 Sol vs Claude Opus 4.8: Production Migration
drafts.title_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 对比 Opus 4.8：生产迁移实操
drafts.hot_topic_source: 3ea88f8bb2d0/2026-07-13 ⭐ #1 — GPT-5.6 Sol production migration case studies (Ploy + Tibo/CLIProxyAPI)
drafts.notes: News-analysis piece on the real production migration from Claude Opus 4.8 to GPT-5.6 Sol, anchored to Ploy's published 2026-06-26 post-mortem (cost 27% lower, wall-clock 2.2x faster, visual score 0.970 vs 0.936, n=10 vs n=11). Four engineering fixes detailed: (1) eval harness audit for incumbent-model assumptions, (2) tool schema transform for Sol's 'fill every parameter' habit (52% empty reads → 0%, 30% fewer tool calls), (3) per-workspace prompt_cache_key strategy raising first-call hit rate from 0% to 83.7% (GPT-5.6 dropped partial-prefix matching), (4) store=false on Responses API for self-contained reasoning replay. CLIProxyAPI covered as the solo-dev / small-team migration lever (Tibo Sottiaux 2026-06-26 X thread). Sonnet 5 re-deployed 2026-06-30 with $2/$10 promo through 8/31/2026 added as competitive context. 10 Q&A FAQ. ~5,500 EN words / ~5,000 ZH chars. Cluster cross-links to: gpt-5-6-pro-tiers-2026, gpt-5-6-sol-terra-luna-api-pricing-2026, sonnet-5-vs-gpt-5-5-vs-opus-4-8-llm-api-2026, claude-sonnet-5-api-pricing-2026. FreeModel affiliate in 3 placements (sidebar CTA, body mention, conclusion).
